title: IC 35-32-2-2 - Theft or conversion; receiving stolen property
text:
IC 35-32-2-2
Theft or conversion; receiving stolen property
Sec. 2. (a) A person may be tried for theft or conversion in any county in which he exerted
unauthorized control over the property.
(b) A person may be tried for receiving stolen property in any county in which he
receives, retains, or disposes of the property.
As added by Acts 1981, P.L.298, SEC.1.
